goals: build a mobile app with backend
mobile app with authentication and database
title: React Native Mobile App + Next.js API Backend
description: End-to-end route for building a production mobile app: a Next.js API backend with auth, database, caching, file uploads, and background jobs — paired with an Expo React Native client that consumes it.

steps.description: Initialise the Next.js API backend with App Router and TypeScript
Add Drizzle ORM for type-safe database access
Add Clerk authentication — Clerk supports Expo natively so the same tenant works for both the API and the mobile app
Add Upstash Redis for API response caching and rate limiting on mobile endpoints
Add S3-compatible file uploads for profile images and attachments sent from the mobile client
Add background jobs for push notification delivery, data sync, and scheduled tasks
Add error monitoring — Sentry supports both Next.js and React Native in the same org
Deploy the Next.js API backend to Vercel and note the production URL
Initialise the Expo React Native client, point API_BASE_URL at the deployed backend, and wire up Clerk Expo SDK for auth
